comment: Österreichische Druckschrift: 3 strokes in order. 1: vertical spine top→bottom. 2: upper arm top-right diagonally IN to spine center. 3: lower arm from spine center diagonally OUT to bottom-right.

strokes.comment: Upper arm: from top-right diagonally inward to spine mid-point
Lower arm: from spine mid-point diagonally out to bottom-right
